title: Name 2 MEDIUM-debt patterns + measure early adoption across all 10 named concepts

method.description: Promote 2 MEDIUM-debt unnamed patterns (sensor-only-trap, planning-obsolescence) to NAMED_CONCEPTS. Measure adoption of all 10 concepts via non-inventor-context citations.
method.naming_process: Agent-based deep investigation of each pattern: collect all ad-hoc phrasings, verify genuinely unnamed, propose formal definition, promote in concept_debt_audit.py
method.adoption_measurement: Count citations of each concept handle in files outside domains/concept-inventor/ and tools/concept_debt_audit.py

expect: Name 2 MEDIUM-debt patterns. Measure early adoption: >=3 of 8 named concepts cited in non-inventor contexts.
actual: Named 2 patterns (planning-obsolescence, sensor-only-trap). Naming ratio: 67% -> 83% (10/12). Adoption: 5/10 concepts cited in non-inventor contexts (50%), exceeding 3/8 expectation. 14 total non-inventor citations. concept-debt leads with 5 citations. 3 concepts (diagnosis-repair-gap, phantom-cascade, escape-hatch-hollowing) have zero external adoption.
diff: Expected >=3/8, got 5/10. Positive surprise: planning-obsolescence (3 citations) adopts fastest because it had pre-existing organic evidence in L-526 (400+ sessions of operational use). Negative: citation depth is shallow — mostly meta-citations (principles referencing invention lessons). True adoption requires concepts appearing in NEW reasoning chains, not just archival references.

concepts_named_this_session.name: Planning-Obsolescence
concepts_named_this_session.definition: At N>=3 concurrent sessions, orient-to-execute gap exceeds concurrent commit rate, making planned work probabilistically redundant before execution.

concepts_named_this_session.name: Sensor-Only-Trap
concepts_named_this_session.definition: Measurement-action decoupling where diagnostic detects a condition that should change downstream behavior but makes no recommendation for behavioral change.

successor: Next measurement at ~S514 (20 sessions). Wire concept-debt-audit into orient periodic for automated tracking. Test: do ORPHAN concepts (0 citations) stay orphaned or converge?
